nodes.name: Seram bush warbler
nodes.summary: The Seram bush warbler (Locustella musculus) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island Seram in Indonesia where it is found on the forest floor. References International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.
